papers.title: Future Dynamic 3D Reconstruction: A 3D World Model with Disentangled Ego-Motion
papers.authors: Nils Morbitzer, Jonathan Evers, Artem Savkin, Thomas Stauner, Nassir Navab
papers.reasoning: 世界模型，自动驾驶动力学环境预测，解耦自车运动与场景动态的3D潜在表示
papers.summary: Proposes FR3D, a world model that predicts a persistent 3D latent representation for future dynamic 3D reconstruction. Uses disentangled ego-motion and environmental dynamics.

papers.title: EventDrive: Event Cameras for Vision-Language Driving Intelligence
papers.authors: Dongyue Lu, Rong Li, Ao Liang, Lingdong Kong, Wei Yin
papers.reasoning: 事件相机+视觉语言模型用于自动驾驶，在模糊/眩光/快速运动下增强感知，驱动物流入口
papers.summary: Event camera-based vision-language model for autonomous driving. Combines event data with RGB for improved perception under blur, glare, and rapid motion.

papers.title: Visual Verification Enables Inference-time Steering and Autonomous Policy Improvement
papers.authors: Mingtong Zhang, Dhruv Shah
papers.reasoning: 视觉验证器框架用于机器人策略推断时引导和自主改进，可迁移到自动驾驶策略
papers.summary: VERITAS: generator-verifier framework for generalist robot policies using visual verifiers for inference-time policy steering and self-improvement.

papers.title: EBench: Elemental Diagnosis of Generalist Mobile Manipulation Policies
papers.authors: Ning Gao, Jinliang Zheng, Xing Gao, Haoxiang Ma, Hanqing Wang
papers.reasoning: 通用移动操作策略诊断基准，评估π0、XVLA、InternVLA等VLA模型，26任务5维度
papers.summary: Benchmark diagnosing generalist mobile manipulation policies including pi0, XVLA, InternVLA-A1 across 26 tasks and 5 capability dimensions.

papers.title: LAGO Policy: Latency-Aware Asynchronous Diffusion Policies with Goal-Directed Collision-Free Planning for Smooth Manipulation
papers.authors: Guowei Shi, Xupeng Xie, Yiming Luo, Jian Guo, Jun Ma
papers.reasoning: 异步推理扩散策略，解决帧间不连续和碰撞问题，对轨迹规划有参考价值
papers.summary: Diffusion-based visuomotor policy with asynchronous inference, inter-chunk consistency, and obstacle-aware execution for smooth manipulation.

papers.title: ThinkingVLA: Interleaved Vision and Language Reasoning for Robotic Manipulation
papers.authors: Tianyi Lu, Hui Zhang, Zijie Diao, Junke Wang, Shengqi Xu
papers.reasoning: VLA模型引入交错视觉语言推理，处理长时序推理密集型操作任务，VLA+CoT方向
papers.summary: VLA model with interleaved vision-language reasoning for manipulation, addressing reasoning-intensive long-horizon tasks.

papers.title: SPARK: Low Latency Single-Camera 3D Pose Estimation for Autonomous Racing using Keypoints
papers.authors: Dominic Ebner, Markus Lienkamp
papers.reasoning: 单目3D姿态估计用于自动驾驶赛车，利用关键点低延迟检测竞赛对手
papers.summary: Monocular 3D pose estimation for autonomous racing, using keypoints for fast detection of opponents.

papers.title: PearlVLA: Progressive Embodied Action-Plan Refinement in Latent Space
papers.authors: Bochen Yang, Lianlei Shan
papers.reasoning: VLA框架在潜在空间中进行行动规划推演，平衡效率与显式推理
papers.summary: VLA framework that moves deliberation into latent space of VLM for efficient action generation with explicit reasoning.

papers.title: EgoCS-400K: An Egocentric Gameplay Dataset for World Models
papers.authors: Rongjin Guo, Dong Liang, Yuhao Liu, Fang Liu, Tianyu Huang
papers.reasoning: 大规模第一人称游戏数据集用于世界模型训练，包含视频-动作-语言轨迹
papers.summary: Large-scale egocentric gameplay dataset with video-action-language trajectories for interactive world model training.

papers.title: Unified Multimodal Autoregressive Modeling with Shared Context-Visual Tokenizer is Key to Unification
papers.authors: Wujian Peng, Lingchen Meng, Yuxuan Cai, Xianwei Zhuang, Yuhuan Yang

papers.summary: UniAR: unified autoregressive framework for multimodal understanding and generation with shared visual tokenizer.

papers.title: Compositional Skill Routing for LLM Agents: Decompose, Retrieve, and Compose
papers.authors: Xueping Gao
papers.reasoning: LLM代理的组合式技能路由框架，可应用于自动驾驶代理系统
papers.summary: SkillWeaver framework for LLM agents to decompose queries, retrieve skills, and compose executable plans.

papers.title: EvolveNav: Proactive Preflection and Self-Evolving Memory for Zero-Shot Object Goal Navigation
papers.authors: Qi Chai, Wenhao Shen, Nanjie Yao, Yue Xia, Kaiyong Zhao
papers.reasoning: 零样本目标导航+自演进记忆，对AD导航堆栈有参考价值
papers.summary: Self-evolving ZS-OGN framework with agentic rule memory for continuous test-time improvement in navigation.

papers.title: Beyond Failure Recovery: An Engagement-Aware Human-in-the-loop Framework for Robotic Systems
papers.authors: Jiaying Fang, Joyce Yang, Zhanxin Wu, Bohan Yang, Tapomayukh Bhattacharjee
papers.reasoning: 人机交互中的参与感知框架，人机协同驾驶场景有参考价值
papers.summary: Human-in-the-loop framework focused on user engagement rather than just failure recovery in robotics.

papers.title: TerraTransfer: Learning End-to-End Driving Policies Without Expert Demonstrations
papers.authors: Zikang Xiong, Weixin Li, Zhouchonghao Wu, Akshay Rangesh, Saarth Bonde

papers.summary: Proposes TerraTransfer: RL-based end-to-end AD training without expert demonstrations, using domain transfer from pre-trained generalist policies.

papers.title: GraphWorld: Long-Horizon Planning with World Models for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Ziying Song, Caiyan Jia, Lin Liu, Lei Yang, Shengkai Zhang
papers.reasoning: 世界模型用于端到端长时域规划，解决现有E2E方法短视问题，图结构场景压缩+规划器联合训练
papers.summary: GraphWorld: E2E AD with world models for long-horizon planning. Uses graph-structured latent scene representation with joint world model + planner training.

papers.title: CausalDrive: Real-time Causal World Models for Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Tianyi Yan, Huan Zheng, Dubing Chen, Meizhi Qu, Yingying Shen
papers.reasoning: 实时因果世界模型，新范式：通过结构化因果图实现互动式模拟，无需oracle轨迹
papers.summary: Causal world model with structural causal graphs enabling reactive simulation without oracle future trajectories. Real-time interactive simulation for AD.

papers.title: OmniDrive: An LLM-Choreographed Multi-Agent World Model with Unified Latent Co-Compression for Multi-View Driving Video Generation

papers.summary: LLM-choreographed multi-agent world model for multi-view driving video generation with unified latent co-compression across camera views.

papers.title: GraphBEV++: Multi-Modal Feature Alignment for Autonomous Driving

papers.title: Multi-Agent Embodied Autonomous Driving: From V2X Information Exchange to Shared World Models
papers.authors: Senkang Hu, Zhengru Fang, Yihang Tao, Zihan Fang, Sam Tak Wu Kwong

papers.summary: Survey on shared world models (SWMs) for multi-agent autonomous driving from V2X perception sharing to coordinated decision-making.

papers.title: PersonaDrive: Human-Style Retrieval-Augmented VLA Agents for Closed-Loop Driving Simulation
papers.authors: Mahmoud Srewa, Praneetsai Iddamsetty, Mohammad Abdullah Al Faruque, Salma Elmalaki

papers.summary: VLA-based traffic agents with human-style retrieval augmentation for diverse driving behavior in closed-loop simulation.

papers.title: DREAM-Chunk: Reactive Action Chunking with Latent World Model
papers.authors: Wenxi Chen, Kaidi Zhang, Chi Lin, Zhiyuan Zhang, Yu She
papers.reasoning: VLA动作分块+潜在世界模型实现反应式执行，解决开环分块在随机环境下的脆弱性
papers.summary: Reactive action chunking for VLA models using latent world models to handle stochastic dynamics in open-loop execution.

papers.title: EditSSC: Toward Editable Semantic Occupancy Scenes with Unconditional Diffusion Models
papers.authors: Fatima Balde, Raoul de Charette, Alexandre Boulch
papers.reasoning: 可编辑3D语义占用场景生成，扩散模型用于AD场景编辑
papers.summary: Editing-ready diffusion-based 3D semantic scene occupancy generation for autonomous driving, enabling scene manipulation.

papers.title: HOLO-MPPI: Multi-Scenario Motion Planning via Hierarchical Policy Optimization
papers.authors: Youngjae Min, Jovin D'sa, Faizan M. Tariq, David Isele, Navid Azizan

papers.summary: Hierarchical RL + MPPI framework for multi-scenario motion planning without per-scenario retuning.

papers.title: DeepIPCv3: Event-Aware Multi-Modal Sensor Fusion for Sudden Pedestrian Crossing Avoidance
papers.authors: Oskar Natan, Andi Dharmawan, Aufaclav Zatu Kusuma Frisky, Jazi Eko Istiyanto, Jun Miura

papers.summary: Multi-modal E2E driving framework with event cameras + LiDAR for sudden pedestrian crossing avoidance.

papers.title: Qwen-RobotWorld Technical Report: Unifying Embodied World Modeling through Language-Conditioned Video Generation
papers.authors: Jie Zhang, Xiaoyue Chen, Anzhe Chen, Dayiheng Liu, Deqing Li
